response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but his experience lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ for capital markets/fixed income systems. His expertise in other languages and domains (e.g., web, mobile, AI) is impressive but not directly transferable to this specific position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with a focus on testability and modern practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Strong communication skills, evident from workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Diverse technical background, including low-latency systems and high-performance databases.
concerns: Limited C++ experience (only briefly mentioned in one role) and no explicit Windows platform development.
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains.
Primary expertise lies in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies, not the required C++/SQL Server/Oracle stack.
